name: Coconut Shrimp
recipeInstructions:
1. In a shallow dish, mix together the flour, salt, pepper, and paprika.
2. Dredge each shrimp in the seasoned flour mixture, coating evenly.
3. Dip the coated shrimp into the beer, ensuring they are well covered.
4. Place the beer-soaked shrimp on a plate.
5. Sprinkle the shredded coconut over the top of each shrimp.
6. Heat vegetable oil in a deep skillet or pot to 350°F (175°C).
7. Carefully lower the shrimp into the hot oil using tongs, making sure not to overcrowd the pan.
8. Fry until golden brown and crispy, about 2-3 minutes per side.
9. Remove the fried shrimp from the oil with a slotted spoon and place on a plate lined with paper towels to drain excess oil.
10. Turn off the heat under the oil when finished frying.
11. Serve immediately with your choice of dipping sauce.
